commands.check-5: git diff --name-only -- install.sh deploy nginx docker-compose.yml

scenarios.scenario-1: Matrix canvas renders nonblank behind user and admin content without intercepting input.
scenarios.scenario-2: Reduced-motion users receive a static readable Matrix surface and no running animation loop.
scenarios.scenario-3: Canvas context is unavailable; runtime logs a controlled fallback marker and the app stays usable.
scenarios.scenario-4: Window resize, route navigation, or component unmount must not leak animation frames or duplicate listeners.

redaction.rule-1: Do not log user emails, access tokens, proxy secrets, tg links, VPN config contents, admin tokens, or screenshot binary data.
redaction.rule-2: Console markers may record viewport dimensions and runtime branch only.

acceptance.target-1: User and admin frontend builds pass.
acceptance.target-2: Canvas nonblank and reduced-motion checks pass on mobile and desktop screenshots.
acceptance.target-3: No protected deploy/install/runtime surface changes are present.
acceptance.target-4: No uncaught console errors occur during init, resize, route navigation, or teardown.
